comment: Export to JSON plugin for PHPMyAdmin

data.name: UPRIGHT SINGLE GLASS DOOR FREEZER
data.description:
• Stainless-steel interior and exterior. Galvanised steel external base, top and back
  • 3 plasticized grids GN 2/1.
  • High-pressure injected polyurethane, without the use of dangerous CFCs;
  • Self-closing doors with magnetic gasket. Thickness: 60 mm.
  • Front electronic control panel with 1 NTC thermistor in TN (normal temperature) models, and 2 NTC thermistors in BT (low temperature) models.
  • Standard removable monobloc and tropicalised refrigeration unit (+40° room temperature and 60% relative humidity) 
  • Automatic defrosting and condensate evaporation
  • Height-adjustable stainless-steel feet (110-190 H mm)
data.technical_specification:
• Inner Depth

  • Power(V/Hz) 230V/50H
  • Volume(L) 700 L

data.name: UPRIGHT SINGLE GLASS DOOR FREEZER
data.description:
• Foaming Agent Cyclopentane
  • Digital thermostat - Dixell
  • Removable Gasket
  • LED light and lock fitted as standard
  • Door: Self closing and reversible door fitted as standard
  • Adjustable shelves GN2/1: 3
  • N.4 S/S Adjustable feet - (Lockable castor as Optional)
  • The items can be supplied either with adjustable feet or lockable castor
  • All shelves mounted with anti-tipping system
  • Curved edge for easy cleaning

data.name: PASTRY DISPLAY SQUARE 900 FCDG 900LS-3
data.description:
• Luxuriant appearance
  • Imported compressor, High efficient cooling system
  • All tempered glasses
  • Digital controller
  • Inner LED light
  • Two tiers tempered glass shelves
  • 4 wheels for easy moving and adjustable feet for breaking
  • Removable condensing system for easy repairing
  • Silicon gasket for glass combination
  • Front ventilation panel could be screwed off to clean the condenser

data.name: UPRIGHT DOUBLE GLASS DOOR FREEZER TECHNODOM
data.description:
• Stainless steel interior and exterior.
  • Galvanised steel external base, top and back.
  • 6 plasticized grids GN 2/1.
  • Self-closing doors with magnetic gasket. Thickness: 60 mm. 
  • Front electronic control panel with 1 NTC thermistor in TN (normal temperature) models, and 2 NTC thermistors in BT (low temperature) models.
  • Standard removable monobloc and tropicalized refrigeration unit (+40° room temperature and 60% relative humidity).
  • Automatic defrosting and condensate evaporation.

data.name: BLAST CHILLER & FREEZER 10 TRAYS
data.description:
• Blast Chiller and Freezer
  • Made of stainless steel AISI-304 (18/10)
  • Chilling production by cycle in kgs of product by cycle: 30
  • Freezing production by cycle in kgs of product by cycle: 20
  • Doors with automatic locking device
  • A choice of hard or soft chilling programmes
  • Two chilling and two freezing cycles:
  • Hard cycle: for products of more than 2cm of thickness
  • Soft cycle: for products of less than 2cm of thickness, or low density. The cycle is made in two programmed steps. The soft cycle avoids the frost formation in the product.
  • Duration of the cycles: chilling: 90 minutes and freezing: 240 minutes (4 hours)
  • Electronic timer and temperature probe standard on all models
  • Automatic end-of-cycle alarm
  • Automatic evaporation of water during defrosting

data.name: ACTIVE GREEN CLEANER TAB
data.description:
• Rational Active Green Tabs (Green) for iCombi Pro & iCombi Classic - 120/Case with special airfreight packing;
  • Thanks to the new formula the number of cleaner tabs can be reduced by up to 50 % depending on the cleaning operation.
  • Keeps both the cooking system and the environment clean:
  • The cleaner tab with its new formula is phosphate and phosphorous-free and reduces the quantity of cleaner by up to 50 %*.
  • Without compromising on cleaning power and hygiene.
  • Can perform an ultra-fast interim clean of the iCombi Pro in approx. 12 minutes

data.name: CARE TAB
data.description:
Rational Care Tabs for Combi Ovens with Care Controls - 150 per Case

Extend the life of your combi oven with Care Controls by using these Rational care tabs.

These tabs are developed with special scale-dissolving ingredients to prevent limescale build-up and guarantee maximum operational reliability at all times without a water softener and time-consuming descaling.

data.name: 20 FOOT CONTAINERIZED COLD ROOM
data.description:
Supply of Pannels

  • Polyurethane Foam (PUF) Wall and roof 80MM Thick
  • Monolithic sandwich construction which is the most advanced, ensures best insulation and uniform structure. 
  • Cladding material is Pre-painted Galvanized Iron (PPGI) 
  • Injected Density 42 Kg/m3
  • Thermal conductivity 0.18 – 0.28 W/m2k
  • Modulus of Elasticity Kg/cm2 40 – 70 Kg/cm
  • Compression Strength Kg/cm2 1.7 – 2.2 Kg/cm2
  • Breaking Elongation 5 – 10%
  • Water Absorption 1.7 – 2.3 Δp/V
  • Operation Temp -60 - +90C


Floor Type

  • Epoxy Floor Type 
  • 0.3 mm thick layer of Epoxy with 80MM thick PUF Insulation
  • Scratch Resistant 
  • Seamless and easy to clean
  • Civil Screeding in Client Scope


Condensing Unit

  • CONDENSING UNIT-AIR COOLED SLIM-ICM15AS
  • Cooling Capacity- 14590 BTU/Hr (4.27 kW)
  • Low power consumption
  • Danfoss - Hermatic Scroll compressor type
  • R404a Refrigerant
  • Air Cooled Aluminum Fin & Copper Tube Tyype
  • 8 Deg.C Evaporating Temperature & 50 Deg.C Condensing temperature.
  • 220 v/ 50 HZ/ 3 PH     Connected Load 3.10 kW
  • Unit Body; Aluminium, PU type Powder Coated, Corrosion resistant and nice appearance.



Evaporator

  • Ceiling Mounted Evaporator Unit /HEAT EXCHANGER A7032 303H - Capacity - 17913 BTU/Hr (5 kW) - Body Size - 58"" x 13"" x 16"" - CMH /
  • Throw- 4680/10 - Heat Transfer Area- 32 Sq Mtr
  • Fan Nos - 3; low-temperature resistance axial fan motor with internal terminal box.
  • 300 mm fan diameter
  • Heater Defrost cycle that is leak proof.
  • Unit Body; Aluminium, PU type Powder Coated, Corrosion resistant and nice appearance.
  • Maintenance; Compact, adjustable & easily openable side panels for easy installation.


Control Panel

  • Control Panel - Standard Control Panel equipped with Microprocessor based controller cum indicator along with required electrical / electronic components
  • Temperature Controls for Positive temoperature applications with LED Indicator lights.
  • Phase failure Prevention mechanism
  • High pressure\Low pressure control meachanism
  • Over current protection
  • Auto Defrost mechanism
  • Delay timer  
  • Solenoid valves 
  • Standard Control Panel equipped with Microprocessor based controller cum indicator along with required electrical / electronic components.


Insulated Door

  • Insulated Swing Door Type
  • 80 mm thick Polyurethane Foam panels with door heater provision
  • Heavy duty hardware
  • Gasket to seal off air leaks
  • Safety Release Handle from inside for safety


Electrical materials 

  • Refrigeration and Electrical Switch Gear.
  • Electrical connections and materials
  • Refrigeration Copper pipework
  • Armoflex Copper Pipe insulation material
  • Refrigerant R404a.
  • Electronic controls. cable trays, flarenuts
  • Weather Proof Lighting, Electrical controls.


Interconnecting Material 

  • Installation, testing and Commisioning.
  • Consumables and Steel Supports - U-channels, PVC internal Angle Lines (75 X 75 MM), PPGI Flashing (50 X 150 MM)
  • Mounting channels.
  • Defrost drainage mechanism
  • Brackets.
  • Wall assembly materials - silicon, mounting Channels
  • Labor setting to work and commisioning



Installation Cost (labor setting to work and testing) 

  • labor setting to work and testing 
  • Test Run the machine and observtion.
  • Training and Handover with the staff who will use the cold room. 
  • Do's and Don'ts training. 
  • Handover the Key
  • FMC Plan.

data.name: DISPLAY COLD ROOM
data.short_description: Showcase Your Products: Our Display Cold Rooms are designed with aesthetics in mind. Featuring glass panels, LED lighting, and elegant shelving options, they transform your cold storage space into a captivating display area. Let your products shine and entice customers at a glance.
data.description:
Discover Excellence in Cold Storage: Introducing Our Display Cold Rooms

Welcome to Sheffield, where innovation meets functionality in the realm of cold storage solutions. We take pride in presenting our state-of-the-art Display Cold Rooms – a pinnacle of design and technology that elevates your product presentation and preservation to a new level.

Why Choose Our Display Cold Rooms?

  • Showcase Your Products: Our Display Cold Rooms are designed with aesthetics in mind. Featuring glass panels, LED lighting, and elegant shelving options, they transform your cold storage space into a captivating display area. Let your products shine and entice customers at a glance.
  • Preservation with Panache: Beyond their stunning appearance, our Display Cold Rooms incorporate the same cutting-edge technology and insulation that define all our solutions. Your products remain at their optimal temperatures while stealing the spotlight.
  • Flexible Configurations: We understand that each business has unique requirements. Our Display Cold Rooms offer customizable shelving and layout options to accommodate various product sizes, ensuring every item is showcased impeccably.
  • Energy-Efficient Brilliance: With an emphasis on sustainability, our Display Cold Rooms are designed to be energy-efficient without compromising on performance. Showcase your products in an environmentally conscious manner.
  • Versatility Across Industries: Whether you're in the food and beverage industry, floristry, or retail, our Display Cold Rooms enhance your product presentation. Elevate the customer experience and drive sales with enticing displays.


Industries We Serve: 

  • Grocery Stores: Highlight fresh produce, dairy, and more in a visually appealing and organized manner.
  • Bakeries: Showcase your delectable baked goods while maintaining their freshness and quality.
  • Flower Shops: Preserve the beauty of flowers and plants while creating an enchanting display.
  • Beverage Retail: Present beverages, including chilled drinks, in a way that captures attention and encourages purchases.
  • Specialty Retail: From cosmetics to pharmaceuticals, our Display Cold Rooms provide the perfect environment to showcase delicate and temperature-sensitive products.


Elevate your product presentation and preservation with our stunning Display Cold Rooms. Turn your cold storage area into a captivating showcase that leaves a lasting impression on your customers. Contact us today to discuss your vision, explore customization options, and embark on a journey to redefine how you display and store your products.

 

Transform your cold storage into a mesmerizing display with us!
data.technical_specification:
Why Sheffield Display Cold room?

  • Design Excellence: Our Display Cold Rooms seamlessly blend functionality with aesthetics, enhancing both the appearance of your products and your store's ambiance.
  • Reliability: Backed by our reputation for quality, our solutions ensure consistent temperature control and reliability.
  • Customization: Tailor the design and layout of your Display Cold Room to your brand and product lineup.
  • Dedicated Support: Our customer support team is here to assist you from installation to maintenance, ensuring a smooth experience. See the Future of Display Cold Rooms: Contact Us Today!

data.name: PRESSES PM98 U3
data.description:
• Electrically heated utility table with boiler and suction unit
  • Manually operated press, allowing an effortless lowering of the upper buck by means of an easy manoeuvrable lever and pedal system.
  • In fact, this operation is carried out by pulling down a large handle placed on the upper board and by pressing the relevant pedal.
  • The lower buck features both up-steaming and suction.
  • The upper board is polished, steam heated and made of stainless steel.
  • The opening of the upper board is controlled by a pedal, which simultaneously sets off the suctioning in order to prevent the shifting of the garment on the board during this operation.

data.name: PRESSES P87-88
data.description:
• Electrically heated utility table with boiler and suction unit
  • The wide opening bucks, facilitate both the pressing operation and the use of the steam iron.
  • Operation of the press head may be controlled by pedals (AP version), in order to leave the operator’s hands free. In this case, to ensure operator safety, a safehands protection frame is fitted to the press head.
  • Alternatively, the head of the press may be controlled by two buttons (AB version), which have to be pushed simultaneously. The presses are available either completely self contained with built-in electric and automatic steam boiler, vacuum and compressor unit as required, or for central supplies operation.

BLAST CHILLER-FREEZER with UNIVERSAL GUIDES for 7 GASTRO-NORM 1/1 GRILLS/TRAINS (mm.530x325) or mm. 600x400.

TECNODOM brand: internal and external structure made of stainless steel with rounded internal corners; insulation in CFC-free polyurethane , injected at high pressure.

Removable upper shelf; door with automatic closing and magnetic seal; front panel with electronic control board with chamber probe and core needle probe ; ventilated refrigeration with air agitator; easily removable and tropicalized refrigeration unit as standard.

(ambient temperature +43°C and relative humidity of 65%) operating with R404A/R507 gas; yield: POSITIVE CYCLE +90°+3° / Kg.25, NEGATIVE CYCLE +90°-18° / Kg.15; opening rear compartment and removable unit, for easy maintenance; evaporator defrost by time, at the end of the cycle, and lower condensation water containment tray; Height-adjustable stainless steel feet (60/90 H mm)

• "Pre rinse shower with Spout
  • 44"" flex hose with spring is great for many pre rinse applications
  • 1.48 GPM spray valve (B-0108) easier to hold and requires less force to activate, reducing employee fatigue; also minimizes heat transfer so that it's comfortable to hold
  • Lever handles with color coded indexes for durability and easy operation
  • Eterna compression cartridges provide excellent durability; solid brass spindle and body; spring checks are included
  • 12"" add-on swing faucet is perfect for times when you need water but don't need a pre rinse faucet
  • Includes wall bracket for added support
  • 46"" overall height
  • Durable chrome plated brass construction"

data.name: PVC SHELVES VENTED 910 PERFECT
data.description:
• Net of Plastic Shelving - 910 mm;
  • High density Eko fit shelving bays supplied with 4 shelves as standard.
  • Corrosion resistant ideal for coldroom applications.
  • Load capacities vary from 150kg to 250kg per shelf - size dependant.
  • Load bearing parts manufactured using high strength anodised aluminium.
  • Plastic components moulded to high resistance using basic acids and bacteria proof raw materials meaning easily removed and dishwasher proof
  • Ventilated shelves to promote airflow around products stored on each level.
  • Shelf slats are removable.
  • NSF, NF, Tuv Nord GS and HACCP accredited.
  • Extension bays, corner supports and extra shelves are also available

data.name: FIRE SUPPRESSION SYSTEM FOR EXTRACTION HOODS
data.description:
• We design kitchen fire hood suppression systems for use in commercial or industrial kitchens to prevent fires without ruining kitchen equipment, food, and produce using a wet chemical system.
  • Supply of "CEASEFIRE KITCHEN SAFE - ULTRA SERIES" Fire Suppression complete with:
  1. Supply & Actuation unit, Stainless steel Cylinder, welded, SS 304 grade. Suitable for 19 Bar working pressure and hydrotested on 35 Bar pressure. Cylinder consists with PVC dip-tube and strainer. Capacity – 11.5, 15.6 Litres or 25 Liters
  2. Detection System - Detection system for automatic operation of the system including Heat Sensing tube and necessary fittings along with fixture.
  3. Extinguishing & Installation

data.name: 500 LITRE SQUARE COMMERCIAL BOILING PAN
data.description:
•  Indirect Steam Heat.

  • Quick to clean guaranteeing high-level hygiene thanks to the satin-finished surfaces 
  • Thermal insulated with high-density 96/128 kg/m3

  • Pottage • Soups • Pasta • Rice • Sauces • Boiled various • Broth • Dairy-based products • Coffee • Boiled vegetables•Packaged products
  • Type of work: • Boiling • Pasteurization • Pressure cooking
  • Steam Consumption 115 Kg/Hr

data.name: ELECTRIC SINGLE WELL FRYER E7F10-4M
data.description:
• Electric Fryer; 10 Litre. Front panels made of AISI 304 STAINLESS STEEL.
  • Pressed and rounded tank equipped with long lasting special rotating resistances made of Incoloy stainless steel; they can reach the operational temperature in very short time increasing oil savings to 60%.
  • The frying system maintains the organoleptic characteristics of the oil which allows for a healthier production and furthermore, limits the required oil changes giving further savings.
  • The resistance rotation makes cleaning operations easier.
  • Adjustable thermostat up to 190° C with control facility, safety thermostat and manual restart.
  • Average frying time of 4 minutes.
  • Pre-heating time of 4-5 minutes (from 20 to 190°C).
  • Maximum output 25 kg/h (E7F10-4B, E7F10-4M),

  • for product, minimizes sticking, and produces delicious, superior quality food.
  • Fully Welded Cooking Well – made from durable 300 Series Stainless Steel.
  • Easy to operate – Temp- N-Time™ feature offers the capability to pre-program up to 10 different cook cycles for quick and easy preparation of various menu items. Solid-state controller is backed by a 2-year warranty.
  • Unique Auto Comp™ feature – automatically adjusts cooking time to accommodate for varying sizes and temperatures of loads.
  • Automatic cook cycle counter – monitors production between filtering.
  • Built-in filter system – provides quick, easy, and safe cooking oil filtration; no heated fittings to disconnect.
  • Touch screen controller option now standard.

data.name: CENTRIFUGAL JUICER CSE
data.short_description: CENTRIFUGAL JUICE EXTRACTOR, STAINLESS STEEL, WITH SAFETY SYSTEM
data.description:
Experience the power of fresh, nutrient-rich juices with the CSE Centrifugal Juice Extractor.

Designed to separate juice from pulp while squeezing, this stainless steel extractor makes it incredibly easy and quick to get natural, healthy juices from a wide variety of fruits and vegetables, including apples, carrots, beets, cucumbers, pineapples, oranges, kale, ginger, and many more.

While the pure juice flows from one side of the equipment, the fruit waste, such as seeds and pulp, is efficiently expelled from the other side.

This remaining pulp can even be creatively used in recipes for breads, jellies, cakes, and other delicious treats.

data.name: EQUIPMENT LAYOUTS
data.short_description:
Understanding our clients’ concept and space requirements is key.

With an in-house team of Design engineers we will design the equipment layout which includes 2D Autocad Layout, 3D, Elevations, Isometrics and Service layouts for a model view of your end solution and product with development of Bills of Quantites.

Our capabilities range from producing, modifying, and creating top-end design renderings for translating concepts into precise and complex technical shop drawings for production
data.description: • We create technical drawings to develop the layout of your facility.

data.name: SINGLE CONTACT GRILL WPG150K
data.description:
• Single Contact Grill;
  • Highly durable single panini grill which has been constructed with ribbed scratch-resistant plates,
  • Heat resistant handles and power indicator lights for convenient handling and long-term use.
  • Ideal for cooking sandwiches, meat and vegetables, compact yet capable of high output, combining fast heat up with an adjustable thermostat for maximum versatility.
  • Auto-balancing top plate.
  • Removable drip tray.
  • Cast iron plates.
  • Cooking area: 244 x 231.
  • Power: 230V, 2kW, 8.7A.
  • Temperature range: 0°C to 300°C.
  • Weight: 23.5 KG

data.name: TRIPLE MILK SHAKE MIXER
data.description: Milk Shake Triple Spindle -Three independent 1 HP peak motor, three-speed rocker switch (16.000, 20.000, and 24.000 RPM) and PULSE switch. Fully automatic START/STOP operation. Motor will run at selected speed oz cup is in position. Cups-Slide into position without tilt. Heavy duty die-cast housing-easy to clean. Brand new ultra-aggressive agitator powers through the hardest ice cream. Also includes butterfly agitator for softer ice creams and use with many types of cups. Stainless steel malt beverage cups (800 ml) include. Motors incorporate thermal protection. Sealed ball bearings-ball bearings are lubed for life with no need to replace, providing long service life.
data.technical_specification:
LENGTH 413 MM

WIDTH 258 MM

HEIGHT 585 MM

POWER RATING 1 HP

ROTATION PER MINUTE 16000 - 25000 RPM

CAPACITY  3 X 0.95 L

VOLTAGE 220-240 V/ 50 HZ

data.name: DOUBLE CONTACT GRILL WPG250K
data.description:
• Double Contact Grill;
  • Highly durable double panini grill which has been constructed with ribbed scratch-resistant plates,
  • Heat resistant handles and power indicator lights for convenient handling and long-term use.
  • Ideal for cooking sandwiches, meat and vegetables, compact yet capable of high output, combining fast heat up with an adjustable thermostat for maximum versatility.
  • Auto-balancing top plate.
  • Removable drip tray.
  • Cast iron plates.
  • Cooking area: 363x275.
  • Power: 230V, 2.4kW, 11A.
  • Temperature range: 0°C to 300°C.
  • Weight: 34.5 KG

data.name: DOUBLE ITALIAN STYLE CONTACT GRILL (SUPREMO) WPG300K
data.description:
• Double Italian Style Contact Grill (Supremo);
  • Ribbed cast-iron plates are great for grilled panini sandwiches, hamburgers, chicken, vegetables and more. 17" x 9.25" cooking surface heats up quickly and distributes heat evenly.
  • Brushed stainless steel body construction and removable drip tray.
  • Hinged, auto-balancing top plate to handle foods up to 3" thick.
  • Thermostat is adjustable to 570°F for slow-to-quick cooking times.
  • Adjustable back feet for easy grease drainage.
  • Dual power ON and READY indicator lights.
  • Heat-resistant handles, no need for mitts or potholders.

data.name: SPICE GRINDER
data.description: Spice Grinder; 650ml. For grinding hard spices and processing pastes, dressings, butters and sauces. Material; Stainless Steel. Voltage 230V. Weight 2.8kg. Colour Silver. Continuous ON operation. Continuous ON operation. High-performance commercial grade motor - 20,000 RPM. Pulse activation to fine tune your grind and create the perfect consistency. Sealed clear-view lid allows for liquid processing. 50W commercial motor. Durable stainless steel blades. Upper housing safety interlock.

data.name: DOUBLE WAFFLE CONE MAKER
data.description:
Double Waffle Cone Maker; 

produce up to 120 crisp cone waffles every hour.

Vertical design maximizes output while using less space and less energy.

Heavy-duty die-cast housing.

Rotary feature for a secure and even bake.

Triple-coated non-stick surface allows for easy removal of waffle cones and minimizes cleanup.

Easy-to-clean electronic keypad.

Bake time control knob for achieving the perfect consistency for any recipe.

Ready lights and audio beeps signal when each grid is ready to start baking.

Audio and visual signals when baking cycle is complete.

Power: 230V, 1.4kW, 6.1A.

Weight: 6.8 KG.

Sold together with Waffle Cone Rolling Tool & Waffle Cone Bowl Pusher.

data.name: ELECTRIC CONVECTION OVEN WITH STEAM 10 TRAY
data.description:
• ELECTRIC CONVECTION OVEN WITH STEAM;
  • Pizzas, bread and fine pastries: use it to cook large batches without sacrificing precious time.
  • Its high performance makes it the ideal ally for any professional in the bakery and pastry business.
  • Sturdy and reliable, it gives you unbeatable freedom to adjust cooking to suit your different needs thanks to the direct steam option.
  • CAPACITY 10. DISTANCE BETWEEN RACK RAILS 80 (mm). OVEN WEIGHT 135 (kg) .
  • POWER SUPPLY 16 (kW).
  • VOLTAGE AC 380/400 3N (V).
  • FREQUENCY 50 (Hz).
  • TEMPERATURE 100 ÷ 275 (°C)

  • Bread, fine pastries but also pizza and leavened products: you can cook in large quantities (up to 10 trays 600x400 mm) without sacrificing valuable time.
  • Robust and reliable allows maximum diversification of cooking as needed thanks to the direct steam feature.

data.name: HAND IMMERSION BLENDER WITH 300MM TUBE
data.description:
The Immersion Hand Blender is a kitchen essential designed for effortless blending, pureeing, and mixing.

This handheld blender boasts a 500-watt motor making it a must-have tool for various blending and mixing tasks.

With its sleek and ergonomic design, these handheld appliance offers the convenience of easy operation directly in pots, pitchers, or bowls, eliminating the need for transferring ingredients to a separate blender.

To be paired with our small but powerful motors*, it effortlessly tackles various culinary tasks, from smoothies, soups, and sauces to creamy dips and whipped toppings.

Its compact size and detachable parts make cleaning a breeze, while the intuitive controls ensure precise blending at different speeds for the perfect texture every time.

Ideal for professional chefs and home cooks, the immersion blender is the go-to tool for achieving smooth and consistent results with minimal effort.
data.technical_specification:
• 300mm tube

• POWER: 350 W / 240 V / 50 Hz

• Speed: 4000 – 16000 RPM

• Voltage: 220V/50 Hz or 110V/60 Hz

• Power: 500W

• Net weight: 3.1 kgs

data.name: C/80 ELECTRIC CONVEYOR PIZZA OVEN
data.description:
The electric power source has been optimized in order to allow the temperature adjustment of the oven top and bottom up to 350°C. The digital control panel is intuitive, allowing the on and off time, the belt speed and the temperature of the oven to be set. There are also 6 different programs that can be set with a simple “click”, for simplified use. The Prismafood electric conveyor oven can also be set to a weekly automatic switching on/off mode. This is a useful function which allows greater performance with less power consumption. The cleaning and maintenance of the conveyor oven is very simple – The Prismafood brand ensures the great reliability and durability typical of all top quality

  • Increased productivity thanks to the conveyor belt and the convection cooking
  • Intuitive digital control panel
  • The ventilated chamber guarantees a uniform baking of food
  • Stainless steel conveyor belt
  • Easy access for a careful cleaning of the interior of the oven

data.name: BAIN MARIE TABLE TOP H-KITCHEN BS-4V
data.description:
Stainless Steel Electric 4 - Pan Bain Marie. Power: 1.5 kw. Voltage: 220-240V. Net weight: 17 kg.

A bain marie is a utensil and a cooking technique.

One container with food to be cooked is placed in another larger pan containing water at the simmering point.

This cooking method surrounds the food with very gentle heat and is used for cooking delicate dishes like custards or white sauces or melting chocolates.

﻿This commercial dishwasher provides exceptional cleaning performance while maintaining compact dimensions of 690mm × 780mm × 1475mm. With its 505mm entrance width and 420mm maximum washing height, the HT-Z1 accommodates a wide variety of dishware and kitchen utensils. This durable and reliable dishwasher is the perfect solution for restaurants, hotels, and catering services seeking to enhance their kitchen efficiency.

data.name: AQ-RO-600 WATERMARK (REVERSE OSMOSIS SYSTEM)
data.description:
Whether you need clean water to effectively operate your water-reliant kitchen equipment, or as a vital ingredient in your food and beverage production, the quality of the water coming out of your tap dramatically impacts your efficiency and final product.

Rather than working around poor water quality, take control of your water by installing a commercial reverse osmosis system in your food service operation.

When you get this system installed, you will have high-quality water all year long for your patrons.

You and your guest will appreciate the high water quality that you offer because everything will taste more delicious than it did before.

data.name: SINGLE GAS FRYER ROLLER GRILL RFG 12
data.short_description: SINGLE GAS FRYER ROLLER GRILL RFG 12
data.description:
The professional gas fryer RFG 12 is particularly suitable for the cooking of fresh and frozen food for take-away.

The filtering basket-holder placed at the bottom of the stainless steel tank has a dual function:

- This filter recovers important residues of frying

- This grid allows to fry without basket large pieces such as donuts or whole fish for "fish and chips" menus

This gas deep fat fryer is equipped with a double ramp of very powerful radiants placed under the stainless steel tank.

The Piezo ignition is made by simply pressing both ignition and adjustment buttons. The pilot light makes it possible to control the arrival of the gas and the good lighting of the fryer. The gas is evacuated by the back pipe.

Maintenance is carried out safely thanks to a stainless steel drain tap.

This modular fryer can be installed on a work surface or mounted on the stainless steel cabinet MS-RFG 12.

Features: Piezo ignition button, thermocouple and pilot light, 2 very powerful burners, draining device, basket, adjustable feet. Stainless steel lid.

data.name: ULTRAFILTRATION SYSTEM VZN-511V
data.description:
The Antunes VZN-511V vertical vision water filtration system is self-cleaning and has mechanical filtration in addition to taste and odor reduction, ensuring long performance life with one yearly carbon cartridge change. This low-maintenance system captures and removes particles as small as 0.015 microns to provide fresh, untainted water. Because it enables beneficial minerals to remain, this system delivers optimal flavor for ice water and water-based beverages such as coffee, tea, and lemonade.

Product Details

  • Ensures reliably fresh-tasting water for consistent product
  • Vertical design streamlines installation
  • 0.015-micron particles are removed with this system
  • Self-cleaning filter performs with minimal intervention
  • Extends equipment life by reducing limescale buildup and mineral stains
  • Processes 5.2 GPM
  • Overall Dimensions: 622 mm W x 254 mm D x 610 mm H

data.name: MODULAR STAINLESS STEEL MOCKTAIL & COCKTAIL UNIT
data.description:
The Modular Stainless Steel Mocktail Unit is a sleek, durable, and versatile serving station designed to enhance beverage preparation and presentation. Built entirely from high–grade stainless steel, it offers exceptional resistance to corrosion, easy cleaning, and long–lasting performance, even in high–traffic hospitality environments.

Its modular design allows flexibility in configuration, enabling seamless integration into bars, restaurants, catering setups, or outdoor events. The unit comes equipped with options of:

  • Stainless Steel Cocktail & Worktop counter with bottle holders and speed rails for mixing and garnishing drinks & easy access to syrups, juices, and mixers.
  • Stainless Steel Display Unit with 4 layers of presentation.
  • Integrated sink and drainage for quick cleaning and rinsing.
  • Shelving and storage compartments for glassware, utensils, and supplies.

The minimalist design complements any décor while providing ergonomic efficiency for bartenders and staff. With its portability and modularity, the unit can be expanded or repositioned to suit different service requirements.

Ideal for: Hotels, lounges, restaurants, catering events, and outdoor pop-ups looking to serve premium mocktails and beverages in style.

data.name: BAR JAR RINSER-9860N-B
data.description:
The BAR JAR RINSER – 9860N-B is a practical and efficient solution for keeping your glassware spotless and ready to use. Designed for both professional bars and home use, this rinser quickly removes suds and residues from hand-washed glasses, while also offering the option to chill glasses before serving for the perfect drink presentation.

Simply press the glass down on the fountain prongs to activate the powerful rinse. The rinser comes complete with a sturdy stand, making it easy to mount on a countertop or draining board for convenient installation.

data.name: HRS - HARDNESS REDUCTION SYSTEM
data.description:
The HRS – Hardness Reduction System is engineered to protect your equipment and enhance beverage quality by preventing lime scale buildup. Using a reliable five-step process, the system effectively removes scale-forming ions, ensuring long-lasting protection for your machines.


By minimizing lime scale deposits, the HRS system not only improves the taste and consistency of beverages but also reduces maintenance frequency and costs. Perfect for commercial kitchens, cafes, and beverage service equipment, this solution ensures optimal performance and extended equipment lifespan.
data.technical_specification:
• Hardness Reduction System
  • 29 - 116 psi (2 - 8 bar)
  • 39 - 86° F operating temperature range
  • 4528 gallon capacity
  • 0.5 gpm
  • 5-step process to remove scale-forming ions
  • lime scale buildup inhibitor
  • System includes flush valve, carbonate hardness kit, and fittings to allow 1/2" ID hose and/or 3/8" OD tubing

data.name: FOOD SINK SHREDDER DISPOSER ED1100
data.description:
The ED1100 Food Sink Shredder Disposer is a powerful and reliable solution for managing kitchen waste with ease. Built with a 1.5HP (1100W) permanent magnet DC motor, it delivers a high-speed performance of 3200r/min, ensuring efficient and ultra-fine grinding of food scraps.


Featuring the advanced Cyclone™ Ultrafine Grinding System, this disposer breaks down waste quickly while reducing the risk of clogs. Its stainless steel grinding components guarantee durability and long-lasting performance, while the permanent antibacterial protection helps maintain hygiene in your kitchen.


For added safety, the ED1100 is equipped with a manual reset protector to guard against overloads and temperature spikes, providing peace of mind during heavy use.

  • Grinding System: Cyclone™ Ultrafine for superior grinding performance
  • Grinding Components: High-quality stainless steel
  • Antimicrobial Protection: Permanent antibacterial technology
  • Safety: Manual reset protector for overload and temperature protection
  • Durable, hygienic, and designed for high-performance waste disposal

Made of polythylene plastic, this ensures the board's resistance to bending, chipping and cracking, the non-absorbent and non-porous surface will not absorb liquids, odors or harbor bacteria, they are stain resistant, easy to clean and are commercial dishwasher safe, they are made to last in the most demanding commercial environments, they are not harsh on your knives and hence will not dull them, they comply with food preparation and sanitary standard.

Temperature Range: 2~8℃.

Input Power: 150 W. 230v/50Hz.

data.name: SINGLE TEMPERATURE DOUBLE TOP FREEZER BD/BC-388
data.description:
Single temperature operation with dual top doors.

Temperature range of 0 to +10 °C or ≤ –18 °C.

Equipped with four casters (without a brake system) for easy mobility.

Features automatic evaporation of condensation water for hassle-free operation.

Includes a built-in electronic voltage protector to guard against electrical surges.

The exterior is made of pre-coated sheet metal, while the interior uses double-layer glass with electric heating on the front glass for improved insulation and anti-fog performance.

Insulated with CFC-free cyclopentane for optimal energy efficiency.

Capacity of 388 Litres

Dimensions of 1440x695x900mm
